subject: Interview Invitation: {{job_title}} at AI Recruitment Organization
template:
Hello {{candidate_name}},

We are excited to invite you for an interview for the {{job_title}} position at AI Recruitment Organization.

Our AI Matching Agent has reviewed your application and verified your qualifications align nicely with our requirements.

Next Steps:

Please review the attached interview questions and coding task prepared for you. We would love to schedule a video call next week to walk through your code.

Best regards,
The Recruitment Team
